question:
38.) You are developing and planning an application onto the AWS Cloud. This application needs to be PCI Compliance. Which of the below steps would you carry out to ensure the compliance is met for the application. Chose 2 answers from the following:

A. Choose AWS services which are PCI compliant
B. Ensure the right steps are taken during application development for PCI Compliance
C. Ensure the AWS Services are made PCI Compliant
D. Do an audit after the deployment of the application for PCI Compliance
